# Fixtures

PDF files have been added to the repository for testing purposes. These files are used to test the functionality of the `punpdf` library.

**Sources**:

- [w3.org/WAI/ER/tests/xhtml/testfiles/resources/pdf/dummy.pdf](https://www.w3.org/WAI/ER/tests/xhtml/testfiles/resources/pdf/dummy.pdf)
- [w3.org/WAI/WCAG21/working-examples/pdf-table/table.pdf](https://www.w3.org/WAI/WCAG21/working-examples/pdf-table/table.pdf)
- [github.com/py-pdf/sample-files](https://github.com/py-pdf/sample-files)

The hand-rolled PDF fixtures are generated by `node scripts/generate-text-fixtures.mjs`. They cover visual reading order, financial tables and schedules, multi-page continuation, repeated page furniture, narrative columns, detached sidebars, symbol decoding, and rotation at both the page and text-run levels.
